response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performed a scene analysis of the video to distinguish between the talk intro and the musical performance. 2. Identified the song title "明日の私に幸あれ" and composer "2060%" from the on-screen graphics. 3. Since the lyrics were not found through web search, I transcribed them directly from the video to fulfill the requirement of providing full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features an introductory talk segment by VTuber Sakura Miko, followed by a vocal performance of the original song "Ashita no Watashi ni Sachiare" featuring Sakura Miko and guest performer Azuki.

scenes.description: VTuber Sakura Miko introduces the live event and talks about her new outfit in an interactive studio setting. No vocal music is playing.
Sakura Miko and Azuki perform the song "Ashita no Watashi ni Sachiare". The lyrics are displayed on-screen throughout the performance.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
May tomorrow be happy for me
Hanpa nai pappa pappa pappa (Hai!)
Genkai toppa pappa pappa pappa (Hai!)
Mainichi hanpa nai pappa pappa pappa (Hai!)
Genkai toppa pappa pappa pappa (Hai!)
May tomorrow be happy for me

Lowest temperature, uh, a ghost blocking it
Eight million unpleasant external factors
With a super carefree "I don't mean anything by it"
Bye-bye to some person who gets in the way without meaning to

Self-time, secure my degradation time, must stick to 17:00 to 9:00
Furthermore, don't forget about love, romance, and sweet things
Ultimately,

I'm telling you off-limits to overwork, and I'm even raising awareness
Hey, it's hard to live comfortably without suffering
Because there are traps in sweet nectar like "stability," "cheat methods," and "cramming overnight"

Yeah!
Sleep when you get sleepy
Wake up past noon
Play because you want to play
Eat rice when you get hungry

Laugh when you're happy
Isn't it okay to cry when you're sad?
For the sake of my tomorrow, I'm working hard again today
I'm working hard today so that I don't have to work hard tomorrow

It's not boring, I'm probably right about that
I'm doing things one way or another!
WHAT? BUT AND BUT
It's okay if no one knows

I have my own my-rules
Say "hi-cheese" to make tomorrow easier
Surprisingly, I want to live my daily life with love and peace like this

Don't be Don't be Don't be shy
I want to be excited
Let Let Let me shine
I hope it's sunny tomorrow

To To To be excite
I want to dance my heart out more
Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday
Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday, Monday

Sing when it gets tough
Complain when you get annoyed
Do as you want
It wouldn't be a struggle if I could do that
Always oscillating between joy and sorrow.
